content.Overview:
The Meraki cloud-managed wireless series is a line of enterprise-grade
WLAN access points (APs) that leverage the award-winning Cisco Meraki
cloud-managed architecture to provide powerful and intuitive centralized
management, while eliminating the cost and complexity of traditional on-site
wireless controllers. Meraki wireless APs are designed for challenging enterprise
environments characterized by high-performance hardware, multiple radios, and
advanced software features with proven scale and reliability (99.9 cloud SLA) to
support the most demanding use cases.
Features: Dedicated radio for security and RF • Intelligent firmware upgrades that
Advanced security to protect against automatic, scheduled firmware
Integrated intrusion detection and • Email and text message alerts upon
Flexible group policy engine for creating

Management: Managed on premises with Cisco Catalsyt Center
Performance features: UL/DL-OFDMA, TWT support, BSS coloring, SU-MIMO, UL/DL MU-MIMO support
20 and 40 MHz channels (802.11n); 20, 40, 80 MHz channels (802.11ac wave 2);
20, 40, 80, and 160 MHz channels (802.11ax); 20, 40, 80, 160, and 320 MHz channels

Performance Features: UL/DL-OFDMA, TWT support, BSS coloring, SU-MIMO, UL/DL MU-MIMO support
20 and 40 MHz channels (802.11n); 20, 40, 80 MHz channels (802.11ac wave 2);
20, 40, 80, and 160 MHz channels (802.11ax); 20, 40, 80, 160, and 320 MHz channels
